select_when: A recurring operational problem has an observable chain of causes and the team needs to get past symptom-fixing quickly.
Questioning can be tied to logs, process evidence, or physical facts rather than opinion, status, or blame.
The investigation can end in an actionable mechanism, design flaw, or missing control that someone can actually change.
The team needs a disciplined way to trace from the immediate failure back toward a falsifiable root cause.
avoid_when: The first answer or first suspect is anchoring the whole chain and every later why is being steered to support that initial story.
A nonlinear, multi-cause system is being forced into a single linear thread while interaction effects, feedback loops, or parallel causes are left out.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model centered on evidence-linked root-cause tracing and anti-symptom discipline rather than on generic introspection advice.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor troubleshooting sprawl because the raw source is already strongest on observable why-chains, actionable mechanisms, and root-cause discipline.
Did not add higher-order fields because this batch remains inside the frozen Wave 1 to Wave 3 contracts.
open_questions: The output label compresses a source that spans Toyota-style operational diagnosis, fishbone support, and first-principles stripping.

select_when.note: The raw source is explicit that the method is strongest for recurring operational problems with evidence-tied causal chains and actionable mechanism fixes.

avoid_when.note: Both anti-activation conditions are directly supported by the source danger lines on anchoring the chain and forcing multi-cause systems into one thread.

input_type.note: The raw source activates on root-cause and mechanism tracing problems, but the compact input label is reviewed normalization.

output_type.note: The source yields a structured why-chain that surfaces mechanism and root cause; the output label compresses that into a typed artifact.

reasoning_types.note: Five Whys clearly relies on causal and diagnostic reasoning, but the taxonomy labels remain reviewed normalization.
